creator: corsmith@gmail.com
text:
I spent time on this earlier today.  Attached is the latest copy of
the port with additional changes over those presented by miwi.

miwi:  Are you interested in writing a rcNG startup script for torrus?

-Corey Smith

On Tue, 19 Dec 2006 23:35:30 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
